title: VMStartResponse
description: Response from starting a CodeSandbox virtual machine (devbox).

cluster.description: The cluster where this VM is running (e.g., eu, us-east)

bootup_type.description: How the VM was started (fresh, hibernated snapshot, etc.)

pitcher_url.description: WebSocket URL to connect to the Pitcher agent inside the VM

pitcher_token.description: Authentication token for connecting to Pitcher

pitcher_version.description: Version of the Pitcher agent running in this VM

reconnect_token.description: Token to reconnect to the same VM session

workspace_path.description: Path to the main workspace directory inside the VM

user_workspace_path.description: Path to the user-specific workspace directory

use_pint.description: Whether the sandbox uses the Pint bundler

pint_url.description: URL for Pint (if use_pint is true)

pint_token.description: Authentication token for Pint (if use_pint is true)
